(For example, an Apple Retina display prefers an icon with twice the resolution.) Providing icons of 16x16px, 32x32px, and 64x64px is sufficient to cover all possible cases. The following is an example of how this property can be used:

::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par87 .Para}
*Example value for default_icon with sized images*

:::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC8 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"action\": {
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"default_icon\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"16\": \"icons/icon-16.png\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"32\": \"icons/icon-32.png\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"64\": \"icons/icon-64.png\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **},**
:::

::: FixedLine
    \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  },
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
:::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB106 .pagebreak aria-label="106" role="doc-pagebreak" title="106"}If you wish to provide a [vector]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm64}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm65} instead, the browser only needs a single vector file to account for all rendering configurations:

::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par89 .Para}
*Example value for default_icon with vector image*

:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC9 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"action\": {
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"default_icon\": \"icons/icon.svg\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
    \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  },
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::
:::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

:::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec11 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec11Heading"}
#### default_popup {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec11Heading .Heading}

This [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm66}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm67} tells the browser where to locate the HTML file that should render as a popup when the extension's toolbar icon is clicked. This can also be set or changed via the WebExtension API's [chrome.action.setPopup()]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [method]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm68}. The following is an example of how this property can be used:

::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par91 .Para}
*Example value for default_popup*

:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC10 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"action\": {
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"default_popup\": \"components/popup/popup.html\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
    \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  },
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::
:::::::::::::
::::::::::::::

:::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec12 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec12Heading"}
#### default_title {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec12Heading .Heading}

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB107 .pagebreak aria-label="107" role="doc-pagebreak" title="107"}This [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm69}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm70} tells the browser the text that should render as a tooltip when the extension's toolbar icon is hovered over. This can also be set or changed via the WebExtension API's [chrome.action.setTitle()]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [method]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm71}. The following is an example of how this property can be used:

::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par93 .Para}
*Example value for* [*default_title*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm72}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm73}

:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC11 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"action\": {
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"default_title\": \"Open Explorer menu\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
    \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  },
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::
:::::::::::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar9 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

If this property is not defined, the browser will use the extension [name]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} property as the hover text.
::::
::::::::::::::::

:::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec13 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec13Heading"}
#### browser_style {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec13Heading .Heading}

**Firefox Only**

This [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm74}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm75} is a boolean that tells the browser if it should inject a stylesheet in the popup to style it consistently with the browser. These stylesheets can be viewed in any Firefox browser at [chrome://browser/content/extension.css]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, or [chrome://browser/content/extension-mac.css]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} on macOS. The property defaults to [false]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}. The following is an example of how this property can be used:

::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par97 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB108 .pagebreak aria-label="108" role="doc-pagebreak" title="108"}*Example value for* [*browser_style*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm76}

:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC12 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"action\": {
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"browser_style\": true**
:::

::: FixedLine
    \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  },
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::
:::::::::::::
::::::::::::::

:::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec14 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec14Heading"}
#### theme_icons {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec14Heading .Heading}

**Firefox Only**

This [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm77}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm78} allows you to define alternate icons based on the current active Firefox theme. It effectively extends the behavior of [default_icon]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}. The following is an example of how this property can be used:

::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par100 .Para}
*Example value for* [*theme_icons*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm79}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm80}

:::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC13 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"action\": {
:::

::: FixedLine
    \...,
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"theme_icons\": \[**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **{**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"light\": \"icons/icon-16-light.png\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"dark\": \"icons/icon-16.png\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"size\": 16**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **},**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **{**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"light\": \"icons/icon-32-light.png\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"dark\": \"icons/icon-32.png\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"size\": 32**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **}**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\],**
:::

::: FixedLine
    \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  },
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
:::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec15 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec15Heading"}
### author {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec15Heading .Heading}

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB109 .pagebreak aria-label="109" role="doc-pagebreak" title="109"}This property provides an [author]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm81}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm82} name for display in the browser. The following is an example of how this property can be used:

:::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par102 .Para}
*Example value for author*

::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC14 .ProgramCode}
:::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"author\": \"Matt Frisbie\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::::::
:::::::::
::::::::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar10 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

If the [developer.name]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm83} is defined, it will override this value.
::::
:::::::::::::

::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec16 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec16Heading"}
### automation {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec16Heading .Heading}

**Chromium Browsers Only**

This property allows developers to access the [accessibility]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm84}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm85}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm86} tree for the browser. This property is only needed in cases where the extension is directly targeting assistive devices. Per MDN, "Browsers create an []{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB110 .pagebreak aria-label="110" role="doc-pagebreak" title="110"}accessibility tree based on the DOM tree, which is used by platform-specific Accessibility APIs to provide a [representation]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm87}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm88} that can be understood by assistive technologies, such as screen readers."

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar11 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

Technologies supporting accessibility are out of the scope of this book. For details on using this API, refer to [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/automation/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/automation/)]{.ExternalRef} and [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Glossary/Accessibility_tree]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Glossary/Accessibility_tree)]{.ExternalRef}.
::::
:::::

:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec17 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec17Heading"}
### background {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec17Heading .Heading}

**MV2/MV3 Breaking Change**

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par108 .Para}
This [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm89}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm90} defines the extension's *background script*. The background script operates behind the scenes to handle tasks like event listening, state management, and communication between extension parts. In [Manifest V3]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm91}, it is implemented as a singleton service worker, which is event-driven and runs only when needed, improving performance and reducing resource usage. Typical uses include

::: UnorderedList
-   Facilitate communication between content scripts, popups, and other extension elements

-   React to and manage browser events such as tab creation or navigation

-   Perform periodic updates using alarms or timers

-   Manage extension [storage]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm92}, secrets, and private data

-   Modify or intercept HTTP requests
:::
::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar12 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB111 .pagebreak aria-label="111" role="doc-pagebreak" title="111"}In [Manifest V2]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm93}, the background took the form of a headless web page. This form factor, while more flexible, had the potential to overconsume system resources.
::::

:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par115 .Para}
*Example definition of a background service worker*

::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC15 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"background\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"service_worker\": \"scripts/background.js\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
  **},**
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::::::::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::

To enable [import]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [statements]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm94} in the background [script]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm95}, [\"type\": \"module\"]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} can be added:

::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par117 .Para}
*Example value for background service worker*[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm96} *with a module script*

:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC16 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"background\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"service_worker\": \"scripts/background.js\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"type\": \"module\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
  **},**
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::
:::::::::::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar13 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB112 .pagebreak aria-label="112" role="doc-pagebreak" title="112"}Refer to Chapter [[[6]{.RefSource}](#534317_2_En_6_Chapter.xhtml)]{.ExternalRef} for details on setting up background scripts.
::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec18 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec18Heading"}
### browser_action {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec18Heading .Heading}

**MV2 Only**

The [browser_action]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm97}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm98} was replaced by [action]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} in Manifest V3. The property values and behaviors are effectively identical. If using Manifest V2, refer to the [action]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} property for details on how to assign a value for this property.

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar14 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

This property is an artifact of extension tooling for older browser versions. [[browser_action]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm99} and [[page_action]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm100} are redundant in all modern browsers. As a result, these properties have been merged into the [action]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm101}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm102}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm103}, which is identical in format and behavior.
::::
:::::

::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec19 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec19Heading"}
### browser_specific_settings {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec19Heading .Heading}

**Non-Chromium Browsers Only**

This [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm104}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm105} defines values that are relevant only to certain browsers. It is rare to have the need to use this property at all. The property takes the form of an object with keys that allocate values to particular browser vendors. Common keys are [edge]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [gecko]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, and [safari]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, which correspond to browsers matching those vendors/engines. The following is an example of how this property can be used:

:::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par124 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB113 .pagebreak aria-label="113" role="doc-pagebreak" title="113"}*Example value for* [*browser_specific_settings*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm106}

::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC17 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"browser_specific_settings\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"edge\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"browser_action_next_to_addressbar\": false**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **},**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"gecko\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"id\": \"owner@example.com\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"strict_min_version\": \"51.0\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"strict_max_version\": \"62.\*\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"update_url\": \"https://example.com/updates.json\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **},**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"safari\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"strict_min_version\": \"21\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"strict_max_version\": \"28\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **}**
:::

::: FixedLine
  **},**
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
**}**
:::
::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec20 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec20Heading"}
### chrome_settings_overrides {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec20Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par125 .Para}
This property allows the extension to override the default settings for certain browser interfaces. Its value is an object with the following [optional properties]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm107}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm108}:

::: UnorderedList
-   [homepage]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} overrides the default homepage of the browser.

-   []{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB114 .pagebreak aria-label="114" role="doc-pagebreak" title="114"}[search_provider]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} defines a new search provider to add to the browser.

-   [startup_pages]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} overrides the default start pages of the browser. This is only supported in Chromium browsers.
:::
::::

::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par129 .Para}
The browser will indicate that these settings are applied in the extension management [interface]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm109}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm110} (Figure [[5-2](#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Fig2)]{.InternalRef}).

<figure id="Fig2" class="Figure">
<div id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_MO2" class="MediaObject">
<img src="/app/temp/1773197898499_images/images/534317_2_En_5_Chapter/534317_2_En_5_Fig2_HTML.jpg" class="ImageStyle3" alt="Screenshot displaying a list of permissions for a browser extension. The permissions include: &quot;Read and change all your data on all websites,&quot; &quot;Change your home page to: buildingbrowserextensions.com,&quot; &quot;Change your search settings to: search.brave.com,&quot; and &quot;Change your start page to: buildingbrowserextensions.com.&quot;" />
</div>
<figcaption><div class="CaptionContent">
<span class="CaptionNumber">Figure 5-2</span>
<p>Google Chrome’s extension management interface showing the <span id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm111">permissions</span><span id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm112"></span> for an extension with applied settings overrides</p>
</div></figcaption>
</figure>
:::

:::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec21 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec21Heading"}
#### Custom Homepage {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec21Heading .Heading}

::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par130 .Para}
The browser [homepage]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm113}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm114}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm115} is the URL that the browser directs the user to when they click the "home" button in their browser (Figure [[5-3](#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Fig3)]{.InternalRef}). All major browsers no longer display a home button by default, but it can be easily enabled in the browser's settings menu. The homepage URL can be overridden as shown in Figure [[5-3](#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Fig3)]{.InternalRef}.[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB115 .pagebreak aria-label="115" role="doc-pagebreak" title="115"}

<figure id="Fig3" class="Figure">
<div id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_MO3" class="MediaObject">
<img src="/app/temp/1773197898499_images/images/534317_2_En_5_Chapter/534317_2_En_5_Fig3_HTML.jpg" class="ImageStyle3" alt="A web browser screenshot showing the URL &quot;about:blank&quot; in the address bar. The browser window includes navigation buttons, with a cursor hovering over the home icon, displaying a tooltip that reads &quot;Open the home page.&quot; The browser interface features standard elements like back, forward, and refresh buttons, along with three colored circles for window control." />
</div>
<figcaption><div class="CaptionContent">
<span class="CaptionNumber">Figure 5-3</span>
<p>Google Chrome with <span id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm116">homepage</span><span id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm117"></span><span id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm118"></span> button enabled and showing the result of clicking the homepage button</p>
</div></figcaption>
</figure>
:::

:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par131 .Para}
*Example value for overriding homepage*[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm119}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm120}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm121}

::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC18 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"chrome_settings_overrides\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"homepage\": \"https://www.buildingbrowserextensions.com\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
  **},**
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::::::::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::
::::::::::::::

::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec22 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec22Heading"}
#### Custom Search Engine {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec22Heading .Heading}

::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par132 .Para}
The search [provider]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm122} decides where to send queries typed into the browser's address bar. [Extensions]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm123}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm124} can access the query string via [searchTerms]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, interpolate it into a search engine URL of choice, and dispatch that URL (Figures [[5-4](#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Fig4)]{.InternalRef}, [[5-5](#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Fig5)]{.InternalRef}, [[5-6](#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Fig6)]{.InternalRef}, and [[5-7](#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Fig7)]{.InternalRef}).

<figure id="Fig4" class="Figure">
<div id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_MO4" class="MediaObject">
<img src="/app/temp/1773197898499_images/images/534317_2_En_5_Chapter/534317_2_En_5_Fig4_HTML.jpg" class="ImageStyle3" alt="Settings page of a web browser showing the &quot;Search engine&quot; section. The main panel displays options for selecting a search engine, with &quot;Brave Search Engine&quot; currently selected. A message indicates &quot;My Example Extension is controlling this setting,&quot; with options to &quot;Manage&quot; or &quot;Disable&quot; the extension. A link to &quot;Manage search engines and site search&quot; is also visible. The sidebar includes navigation options like &quot;Privacy and security,&quot; &quot;Performance,&quot; and &quot;Languages.&quot;" />
</div>
<figcaption><div class="CaptionContent">
<span class="CaptionNumber">Figure 5-4</span>
<p>Chrome settings page indicating an <span id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm125">extension</span><span id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm126"></span> is controlling the default search engine</p>
</div></figcaption>
</figure>

<figure id="Fig5" class="Figure">
<div id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_MO5" class="MediaObject">
<img src="/app/temp/1773197898499_images/images/534317_2_En_5_Chapter/534317_2_En_5_Fig5_HTML.jpg" class="ImageStyle3" alt="Screenshot of a Chrome browser settings page under &quot;Search engine&quot; options. It lists search engines with their names and shortcuts: Google (google.com), Microsoft Bing (bing.com), Yahoo! (yahoo.com), DuckDuckGo (duckduckgo.com), Yandex (yandex.com), and Brave Search Engine (search.brave.com), which is set as default. Options to manage or disable extensions are visible. The interface includes a sidebar with various settings categories like &quot;Privacy and security&quot; and &quot;Appearance.&quot;" />
</div>
<figcaption><div class="CaptionContent">
<span class="CaptionNumber">Figure 5-5</span>
<p>Chrome search engine settings showing an <span id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm127">extension controlling the default engine</span><span id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm128"></span></p>
</div></figcaption>
</figure>

<figure id="Fig6" class="Figure">
<div id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_MO6" class="MediaObject">
<img src="/app/temp/1773197898499_images/images/534317_2_En_5_Chapter/534317_2_En_5_Fig6_HTML.jpg" class="ImageStyle3" alt="Screenshot of a web browser&#39;s address bar showing search suggestions for &quot;foobar.&quot; Suggestions include &quot;foobar - Brave Search Engine Search,&quot; &quot;Google Search,&quot; &quot;foobar2000 - Brave Search Engine Search,&quot; and &quot;foobar2000 download.&quot; The browser interface includes a &quot;New Tab&quot; label and icons at the bottom right." />
</div>
<figcaption><div class="CaptionContent">
<span class="CaptionNumber">Figure 5-6</span>
<p>Typing in a search query into the address <span id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm129">bar</span><span id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm130"></span> shows it being routed to the custom search engine</p>
</div></figcaption>
</figure>

<figure id="Fig7" class="Figure">
<div id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_MO7" class="MediaObject">
<img src="/app/temp/1773197898499_images/images/534317_2_En_5_Chapter/534317_2_En_5_Fig7_HTML.jpg" class="ImageStyle3" alt="Screenshot of a Brave Search results page for &quot;foobar.&quot; The page displays search results including links to &quot;Foobar2000&quot; and &quot;Foobar - Wikipedia.&quot; The Wikipedia snippet describes &quot;foobar&quot; as a placeholder name in programming. The interface shows tabs for &quot;All,&quot; &quot;Images,&quot; &quot;News,&quot; &quot;Videos,&quot; and &quot;Goggles.&quot; The search bar at the top contains the query &quot;foobar.&quot;" />
</div>
<figcaption><div class="CaptionContent">
<span class="CaptionNumber">Figure 5-7</span>
<p>Results after executing the address bar <span id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm131">search</span><span id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm132"></span></p>
</div></figcaption>
</figure>
:::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar15 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB118 .pagebreak aria-label="118" role="doc-pagebreak" title="118"}The browser's search engine settings are initialized early in the browser startup. You may need to reboot your browser entirely to see these manifest changes take effect.
::::

The search engine can be overridden as follows:

::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par135 .Para}
*Example value for overriding search_provider*[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm133}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm134}

:::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC19 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"chrome_settings_overrides\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"search_provider\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"name\": \"Brave Search Engine\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"prepopulated_id\": 109,**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"search_url\": \"https://search.brave.com/search?q={searchTerms}\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"encoding\": \"UTF-8\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"is_default\": true**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **}**
:::

::: FixedLine
  **}**  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
:::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::

[Search engine selection]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm135}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm136} is not arbitrary. Chromium browsers require you to select from a prepopulated list of search engines: [[[[https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:components/search_engines/prepopulated_engines.json]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:components/search_engines/prepopulated_engines.json)]{.ExternalRef}.

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar16 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

For details on custom search engine behavior, refer to [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/manifest/chrome-settings-override]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/manifest/chrome-settings-override)]{.ExternalRef}.
::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::

:::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec23 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec23Heading"}
#### Custom Startup Page {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec23Heading .Heading}

**Chromium Browsers Only**

::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par139 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB119 .pagebreak aria-label="119" role="doc-pagebreak" title="119"}The startup [page]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm137}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm138} is the page that opens when the browser program initially starts up. An [extension]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm139}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm140} can set the startup page by providing an array containing exactly one URL (Figure [[5-8](#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Fig8)]{.InternalRef}). The [startup page URL]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm141} can be overridden as shown in Figure [[5-8](#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Fig8)]{.InternalRef}.

<figure id="Fig8" class="Figure">
<div id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_MO8" class="MediaObject">
<img src="/app/temp/1773197898499_images/images/534317_2_En_5_Chapter/534317_2_En_5_Fig8_HTML.jpg" class="ImageStyle3" alt="Screenshot of the Chrome settings page under &quot;On startup&quot; options. The page allows users to choose startup behavior: open the New Tab page, continue where left off, or open specific pages. A specific page is set to &quot;The ultimate Chrome extension tutorial&quot; with the URL &quot;https:/www.buildingbrowserextensions.com/&quot;. A message indicates &quot;My Example Extension is controlling this setting&quot; with options to manage or disable it. The left sidebar shows various settings categories like &quot;Autofill and passwords&quot; and &quot;Privacy and security&quot;." />
</div>
<figcaption><div class="CaptionContent">
<span class="CaptionNumber">Figure 5-8</span>
<p>Chrome settings displaying the overridden startup <span id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm142">page</span></p>
</div></figcaption>
</figure>
:::

:::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par140 .Para}
*Example value for overriding startup page*[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm143}

::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC20 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"chrome_settings_overrides\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"startup_pages\": \[**
:::

::: FixedLine
      \"**https://www.buildingbrowserextensions.com\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\]**
:::

::: FixedLine
  **},**
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::::::::::
:::::::::::::
::::::::::::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar17 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB120 .pagebreak aria-label="120" role="doc-pagebreak" title="120"}The [chrome\_]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} prefix is unrelated to browser compatibility. This property is at least partially supported by Chromium browsers and Firefox.
::::
::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec24 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec24Heading"}
### chrome_url_overrides {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec24Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par142 .Para}
This [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm144}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm145} allows the extension to override the default page for certain browser interfaces. Each extension may override exactly one of the following browser pages:

::: UnorderedList
-   History page

-   Bookmarks page

-   New Tab page
:::
::::

The [chrome_url_overrides]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} value should be an object with only one of the following properties: [history]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [bookmarks]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, and [newtab]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}. The following is an example of how this property can be used:

:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par147 .Para}
*Example value for* [*chrome_url_overrides*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm146}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm147}

::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC21 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"chrome_url_overrides\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"newtab\": \"components/newtab/newtab.html\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
  **},**
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::::::::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar18 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB121 .pagebreak aria-label="121" role="doc-pagebreak" title="121"}The [chrome\_]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} prefix is unrelated to browser compatibility. This property is at least partially supported by Chromium browsers and Firefox.
::::
:::::::::::::::::

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec25 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec25Heading"}
### commands {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec25Heading .Heading}

This property is used to map keyboard commands to perform various tasks in your [extension]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm148}. An example of this is opening and closing the extension popup when the user presses [Ctrl+Shift+F]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}. Whereas mapping multi-key commands in JavaScript involves setting listeners for [keydown]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} or similar events, the [commands]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} property allows you to natively map multi-key keyboard commands using a [simple and intuitive syntax]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm149}. You can define two types of commands: shortcuts, which associate a keyboard command with a predefined set of native browser behaviors, or custom commands, which associate a keyboard command with a special event that can be handled via the WebExtensions API.

:::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec26 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec26Heading"}
#### Command Syntax {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec26Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par150 .Para}
All [commands]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm150}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm151}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm152} have the same syntax. Each takes the form of an object with two properties:

::: UnorderedList
-   A [suggested_key]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} object, which defines the multi-key shortcuts that should invoke the command

-   A [description]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} string, which will appear in the extension keyboard shortcut management UI
:::
::::

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB122 .pagebreak aria-label="122" role="doc-pagebreak" title="122"}The following is an example of how to define a shortcut for a generic [foobar]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [command]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm153}:

:::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par154 .Para}
*Example value for a* [*generic foobar command*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm154}

::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC22 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"commands\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"foobar\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"suggested_key\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"default\": \"Ctrl+Shift+F\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **},**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"description\": \"Run \'foobar\' on the current page.\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **},**  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  },
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::
::::::::::::::

:::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::
:::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::

::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par155 .Para}
Once the [extension]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm155}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm156} is loaded, the browser will reflect this shortcut in its keyboard shortcut management UI (Figure [[5-9](#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Fig9)]{.InternalRef}).[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB123 .pagebreak aria-label="123" role="doc-pagebreak" title="123"}

<figure id="Fig9" class="Figure">
<div id="534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_MO9" class="MediaObject">
<img src="/app/temp/1773197898499_images/images/534317_2_En_5_Chapter/534317_2_En_5_Fig9_HTML.jpg" class="ImageStyle3" alt="Screenshot of the Chrome Extensions page showing a section for managing extensions. The page includes options to load unpacked extensions, pack extensions, and update them. A specific extension, &quot;My Example Extension,&quot; is displayed with a keyboard shortcut set to &quot;Ctrl + F&quot; for running a command on the current page. The page also has a search bar for extensions and a toggle for developer mode." />
</div>
<figcaption><div class="CaptionContent">
<span class="CaptionNumber">Figure 5-9</span>
<p>Chrome shortcuts page showing the registered extension command shortcut</p>
</div></figcaption>
</figure>
:::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar19 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

The shortcuts list is available at [chrome://extensions/shortcuts]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} in Chrome and in the [about:addons]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} interface in Firefox.
::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::

::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec27 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec27Heading"}
#### Defining Key Shortcuts {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec27Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par157 .Para}
When a key [shortcut]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm157}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm158}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm159} is defined, the browser will watch for the specified key combination and execute the matching command when they are pressed. The following key identifiers are available for [use]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm160}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm161}:

::: UnorderedList
-   Alphanumeric keys: [A--Z]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} and [0--9]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   General keys: [Comma]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [Period]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [Home]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [End]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [PageUp]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [PageDown]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [Space]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [Insert]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [Delete]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   Function keys: [F1--F12]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   Arrow keys: [Up]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [Down]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [Left]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [Right]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   []{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB124 .pagebreak aria-label="124" role="doc-pagebreak" title="124"}Media keys: [MediaNextTrack]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [MediaPlayPause]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [MediaPrevTrack]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [MediaStop]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   Modifier keys: [Ctrl]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [Alt]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [Shift]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [MacCtrl]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} (macOS only), [Command]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} (macOS only), [Search]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} (ChromeOS only)
:::
::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par164 .Para}
[Key shortcuts]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm162} have the following restrictions:

::: UnorderedList
-   Key shortcuts cannot overlap with default browser key combinations. For example, [Ctrl+R]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} is already mapped by the browser to reload the page and therefore is unavailable for use by extension commands.

-   Key shortcuts must consist of either two or three keys.

-   [Key shortcuts]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm163} must include either [Ctrl]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} (or [MacCtrl]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} on macOS) or [Alt]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} but not both.
:::
::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par168 .Para}
The [shortcut]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm164} is defined as a string with the key identifiers concatenated by [+]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}. Some examples of valid key [shortcuts]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm165}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm166}:

::: UnorderedList
-   [Ctrl+Shift+F]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [Alt+Q]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [MacCtrl+Shift+F12]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [Alt+MediaPlayPause]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}
:::
::::
:::::::::

::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec28 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec28Heading"}
#### Multi-browser Support {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec28Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par173 .Para}
The [suggested_key]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} object at a minimum should define a [default]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} key [shortcut]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm167}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm168}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm169}. To support different operating systems, the following properties can additionally be defined:

::: UnorderedList
-   [mac]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [linux]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [windows]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [chromeos]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [android]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [ios]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}
:::
::::

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB125 .pagebreak aria-label="125" role="doc-pagebreak" title="125"}If these values are provided and match the host OS, the browser will automatically select them instead of the default value.
:::::

::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec29 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec29Heading"}
#### Reserved Commands {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec29Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par181 .Para}
The [browser]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm170}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm171}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm172} will give some command names special treatment:

::: UnorderedList
-   In [Manifest V3]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm173}, [\_execute_action]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} will act as a click on the extension toolbar button.

-   In [Manifest]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm174} V2, [\_execute_page_action]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} will act as a click on the extension page action button.

-   In Manifest V2, [\_execute_browser_action]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} will act as a click on the extension browser action button.

-   In Firefox and Manifest V2, [\_execute_sidebar_action]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} will open the extension's sidebar.
:::
::::

The following command would open the popup when the user uses the [Ctrl+Shift+F]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} shortcut:

:::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par187 .Para}
*Example value for a* [*reserved \_execute_action command*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm175}

::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC23 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"commands\": {
:::

::: FixedLine
    \"**\_execute_action**\": {
:::

::: FixedLine
      \"suggested_key\": {
:::

::: FixedLine
        \"default\": \"Ctrl+Shift+F\"
:::

::: FixedLine
      }
:::

::: FixedLine
    }
:::

::: FixedLine
  },
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar20 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB126 .pagebreak aria-label="126" role="doc-pagebreak" title="126"}When these reserved commands execute, the browser will not fire the [onCommand()]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} method.
::::
:::::::::::::::::::::

:::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec30 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec30Heading"}
#### Custom Commands {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec30Heading .Heading}

For all [command]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm176}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm177}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm178} identifiers that do not match the reserved commands, the key shortcut will dispatch a command event to all listeners of [[commands.onCommand()]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm179}.

::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par190 .Para}
*Example value for a* [*generic foobar command*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm180}

:::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC24 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"commands\": {
:::

::: FixedLine
    \"**foobar**\": {
:::

::: FixedLine
      \"suggested_key\": {
:::

::: FixedLine
        \"default\": \"Ctrl+Shift+F\"
:::

::: FixedLine
      },
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"description\": \"Run \'foobar\' on the current page.\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
    }
:::

::: FixedLine
  },
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
:::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::

:::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par191 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB127 .pagebreak aria-label="127" role="doc-pagebreak" title="127"}The [foobar]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [command]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm181}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm182}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm183} from above would be handled in a background script as follows:

::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC25 .ProgramCode}
:::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
chrome.commands.onCommand.addListener((command) =\> {
:::

::: FixedLine
  console.log(\`Command: \${command}\`); **// Command: foobar**
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::
::::::
:::::::
::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::

::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec31 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec31Heading"}
#### Global Commands {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec31Heading .Heading}

By default, when the browser is not focused on the [device]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm184}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm185}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm186}, keyboard shortcuts will not dispatch any extension commands. [Chromium browsers]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm187} support an optional [global]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} property for commands that allows commands that use only shortcuts matching [Ctrl+Shift+\[0..9\]]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} to be triggered even when the browser does not have focus. The following is an example of this:

:::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par193 .Para}
*Example value for a* [*global foobar command*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm188}

::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC26 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"commands\": {
:::

::: FixedLine
    \"foobar\": {
:::

::: FixedLine
    \"suggested_key\": {
:::

::: FixedLine
      \"default\": **\"Ctrl+Shift+0\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
    },
:::

::: FixedLine
    \"description\": \"Run \'foobar\' on the current page.\",
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"global\": true**
:::

::: FixedLine
  },  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar21 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

For details on using the commands API, refer to Chapter [[[9]{.RefSource}](#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml)]{.ExternalRef}.
::::
:::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec32 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec32Heading"}
### content_capabilities {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec32Heading .Heading}

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB128 .pagebreak aria-label="128" role="doc-pagebreak" title="128"}This [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm189}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm190} is obsolete and should not be used. Before the release of the Clipboard API and the Persistent Storage API, it was useful for granting extensions the ability to access the clipboard or unlimited storage. With access to these new APIs, this property is no longer needed.
:::

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec33 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec33Heading"}
### content_scripts {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec33Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par196 .Para}
This [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm191}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm192} defines which files should be injected as content scripts, where to inject them, and in what fashion. Its value is an array of objects, each of which defines a separate set of content scripts and rules for those scripts. Each object contains the following:

::: UnorderedList
-   The [matches]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm193} must contain an array of one or more URL matchers. Each URL that matches these URL matchers will have the scripts injected. This property is required.

-   The [js]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} and [css]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [properties]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm194} each contain an array of one or more files that should be injected as content scripts when the page URL is a match. One or both should be defined.

-   :::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par199 .Para}
    The [run_at]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm195} defines when the content scripts are to be injected. This can be either [document_start]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [document_end]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, or [document_idle]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}. The default value is [document_idle]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}.

    ::: UnorderedList
    -   [document_start]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} injects the scripts when [document.readyState === \"loading\"]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

    -   [document_end]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} injects the scripts when [document.readyState === \"interactive\"]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

    -   [document_idle]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} injects the scripts when [document.readyState === \"complete\"]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}
    :::
    ::::

-   :::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par203 .Para}
    []{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB129 .pagebreak aria-label="129" role="doc-pagebreak" title="129"}You can optionally subject the URL to three additional [filters]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm196}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm197}, evaluated as follows:

    ::: UnorderedList
    -   The [include_globs]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm198} can be defined as a whitelist of URL globs. If provided, the content scripts will *only* be injected if the URL matches this glob array.

    -   The [exclude_matches]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm199} can be defined as a blacklist of URL matchers. If provided, the content scripts will *only* be injected if the URL *does not match* this matchers array.

    -   The [exclude_globs]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm200} can be defined as a blacklist of URL globs. If provided, the content scripts will *only* be injected if the URL *does not match* this glob array.

    -   The [match_about_blank]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm201} enables the content script to be injected on the [about:blank or about:srcdoc]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} URLs.

    -   The [all_frames]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm202} enables the content script to be injected into nested frames.
    :::
    ::::
:::
::::

The following is an example of how this [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm203}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm204} can be used:

:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par210 .Para}
*Example value for* [*content_scripts*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm205}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm206}

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC27 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"content_scripts\": \[**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **{**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"matches\": \[**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"\*://example.com/\*\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\],**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"include_globs\": \[**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"\*archive\*\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\],**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"exclude_matches\": \[**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"\*://example.com/experimental/\*\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\],**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"exclude_globs\": \[**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"\*?display=legacy\*\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\],**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"js\": \[**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"scripts/content-script.js\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\],**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"css\": \[**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"styles/content-script.css\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\],**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"run_at\": \"document_end\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"match_about_blank\": true,**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"all_frames\": true**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **}**
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\],**
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar22 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Tip
:::

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB130 .pagebreak aria-label="130" role="doc-pagebreak" title="130"}The [match_about_blank]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [key]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm207} has some very interesting background: [[[[https://stackoverflow.com/questions/41408936]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/41408936)]{.ExternalRef}.
::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar23 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

For additional details on content scripts, refer to Chapter [[[8]{.RefSource}](#534317_2_En_8_Chapter.xhtml)]{.ExternalRef}.
::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

:::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec34 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec34Heading"}
### content_security_policy {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec34Heading .Heading}

**MV2/MV3 Breaking Change**

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par214 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB131 .pagebreak aria-label="131" role="doc-pagebreak" title="131"}This property defines the [Content Security Policies (CSP)]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm208}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm209}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm210} of the extension. This property was significantly altered between Manifest V2 and V3, including in structure and in allowed values. In MV3, the property is an object, with two possible keys:

::: UnorderedList
-   [extension_pages]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} defines the CSP for all non-sandboxed extension pages.

-   [sandbox]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} defines the CSP for all sandboxed extension pages.
:::
::::

Furthermore, Manifest V3 in Chromium browsers disallows some CSP values in non-sandboxed extension pages to prevent insecure operations like [eval()]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} and third-party script execution. The following is an example of how this property can be used:

::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par218 .Para}
*Example value for content_security_policy in* [*Manifest V3*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm211}

:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC28 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"content_security_policy\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"extension_pages\": \"script-src \'self\'\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"sandbox\": \"script-src \'self\' https://example.com; object-src \'self\'\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
  **},**
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::
:::::::::::::

Importantly, the [[content_security_policy]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm212} manifest definition cannot *remove* restrictions; it can only add them.

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar24 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB132 .pagebreak aria-label="132" role="doc-pagebreak" title="132"}Details of extension sandbox pages are covered in Chapter [[[4]{.RefSource}](#534317_2_En_4_Chapter.xhtml)]{.ExternalRef}. For details on Manifest V3 CSP restrictions, refer to [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/develop/migrate/improve-security#update-csp]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/develop/migrate/improve-security#update-csp)]{.ExternalRef}.
::::
::::::::::::::::::

::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec35 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec35Heading"}
### converted_from_user_script {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec35Heading .Heading}

**Deprecated**

This property was used as part of Google's supported [transition]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm213}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm214} from userscripts in 2016. Its purpose was so that Chrome Apps, which shared APIs with web extensions, could direct their users to a replacement Progressive Web Application via an [installReplacementWebApp()]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} method. No modern extensions will have a use for this property.

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar25 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

Read more about the transition from Chrome Apps here: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/apps/migration/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/apps/migration/)]{.ExternalRef}.
::::
:::::

::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec36 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec36Heading"}
### cross_origin_embedder_policy {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec36Heading .Heading}

**Chromium Browsers Only**

**MV3 Only**

This property defines the [Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy (COEP)]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm215}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm216}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm217} header value for requests to the extension's origin. Because the extension behaves in many ways like a web server, it can be vulnerable to the same origin-based security issues that web servers are. If you wish to enable features that are only accessible with cross-origin isolation, this property is used to set the COEP header value to behave in such a manner. This property must be set in conjunction with the [cross_origin_opener_policy]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} property to enable cross-origin isolation.

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB133 .pagebreak aria-label="133" role="doc-pagebreak" title="133"}The property contains an object with a single [value]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} property. The following is an example of how this property can be used to enable cross-origin isolation:

:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par228 .Para}
*Example value for* [*cross_origin_embedder_policy*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm218}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm219}

::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC29 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"cross_origin_embedder_policy\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"value\": \"require-corp\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
  **},**
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::::::::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar26 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

[Cross-origin isolation]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm220} is an important subject outside the scope of this book. For an excellent blog post on it, visit [[[[https://web.dev/coop-coep/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://web.dev/coop-coep/)]{.ExternalRef}.
::::
:::::::::::::::

::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec37 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec37Heading"}
### cross_origin_opener_policy {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec37Heading .Heading}

**Chromium Browsers Only**

**MV3 Only**

This property defines the [Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy (COOP)]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm221}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm222} header value for requests to the extension's origin. Because the extension behaves in many ways like a web server, it can be vulnerable to the same origin-based security issues that web servers are. If you wish to enable features that are only accessible with [cross-origin isolation]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm223}, this property is used to set the COOP header value to behave in such a manner. This property must be set in conjunction with the [cross_origin_embedder_policy]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} property to enable cross-origin isolation.

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB134 .pagebreak aria-label="134" role="doc-pagebreak" title="134"}The [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm224}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm225} contains an object with a single [value]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} property. The following is an example of how this property can be used to enable cross-origin isolation:

:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par234 .Para}
*Example value for cross_origin_opener_policy*[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm226}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm227}

::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC30 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"cross_origin_opener_policy\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"value\": \"same-origin\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
  **},**
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::::::::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar27 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

[Cross-origin isolation]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm228} is an important subject outside the scope of this book. For an excellent blog post on it, visit [[[[https://web.dev/coop-coep/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://web.dev/coop-coep/)]{.ExternalRef}.
::::
:::::::::::::::

::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec38 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec38Heading"}
### declarative_net_request {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec38Heading .Heading}

**MV3 Only**

This [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm229}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm230} defines the rulesets to be used for the Declarative Net Request API. The value is an object with a single [rule_resources]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} key, which defines an array of all the ruleset objects provided in the extension. Each ruleset object must define a unique [id]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} string, an [enabled]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} boolean controlling if the [browser]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm231}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm232} should use the ruleset, and [path]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} string with relative path to the ruleset JSON file. The following is an example of how this property can be used:

:::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par238 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB135 .pagebreak aria-label="135" role="doc-pagebreak" title="135"}*Example value for* [*declarative_net_request*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm233}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm234}*, with ruleset_1 enabled by default and ruleset_2 disabled by default*

::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC31 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"declarative_net_request\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"rule_resources\" : \[**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **{**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"id\": \"ruleset_1\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"enabled\": true,**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"path\": \"ruleset_1.json\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **}, {**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"id\": \"ruleset_2\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"enabled\": false,**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"path\": \"ruleset_2.json\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **}**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\]**
:::

::: FixedLine
  **},**
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar28 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

For details on the [Declarative Net Request API]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm235}, ruleset definition, and permissions for [declarative_net_request]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, refer to Chapter [[[11]{.RefSource}](#534317_2_En_11_Chapter.xhtml)]{.ExternalRef}.
::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::

::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec39 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec39Heading"}
### default_locale {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec39Heading .Heading}

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB136 .pagebreak aria-label="136" role="doc-pagebreak" title="136"}This [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm236}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm237} defines the default locale string. The property must be present if and only if there is a [\_locales]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} directory as described in the locales section earlier in this chapter. The following is an example of how this property can be used:

:::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par241 .Para}
*Example value for* [*default_locale*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm238}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm239}

::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC32 .ProgramCode}
:::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"default_locale\": \"en\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::::::
:::::::::
::::::::::
:::::::::::

::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec40 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec40Heading"}
### description {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec40Heading .Heading}

This property defines the formal [description]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm240}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm241} of the extension. This value is displayed in the browser as well as in the extension marketplaces. The following is an example of how this property can be used:

:::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par243 .Para}
*Example value for* [*description*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm242}

::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC33 .ProgramCode}
:::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"description\": \"A collection of browser extension examples\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::::::
:::::::::
::::::::::
:::::::::::

:::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec41 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec41Heading"}
### developer {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec41Heading .Heading}

**Firefox Only**

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB137 .pagebreak aria-label="137" role="doc-pagebreak" title="137"}This [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm243}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm244} defines an object containing an author name and/or extension homepage URL for display in the browser. Both the [name]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} and [url]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} properties are optional. The following is an example of how this property can be used:

::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par246 .Para}
*Example value for* [*developer*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm245}

:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC34 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"developer\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"name\": \"Matt Frisbie\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"url\": \"https://www.buildingbrowserextensions.com\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
  **},**
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::
:::::::::::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar29 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

If the [developer]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [properties]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm246} are defined, they will override the [author]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} and [homepage_url]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} properties.
::::
::::::::::::::::

::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec42 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec42Heading"}
### devtools_page {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec42Heading .Heading}

This [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm247}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm248} tells the browser where to locate the HTML file that should be used as the entrypoint to your extension's developer tools content. This page is used to bootstrap the developer utilities, but it renders as a headless page. The following is an example of how this property can be used:

:::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par249 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB138 .pagebreak aria-label="138" role="doc-pagebreak" title="138"}*Example value for* [*devtools_page*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm249}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm250}

::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC35 .ProgramCode}
:::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"devtools_page\": \"components/devtools/devtools.html\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::::::
:::::::::
::::::::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar30 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

Refer to Chapter [[[9]{.RefSource}](#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml)]{.ExternalRef} for details on setting up custom developer tools interfaces.
::::
:::::::::::::

::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec43 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec43Heading"}
### differential_fingerprint {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec43Heading .Heading}

This [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm251}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm252} is an internal key used by the Chrome Web Store for extension update distribution. You should not set this property in any circumstance.

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar31 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

The Chrome Web Store generates the property when sending out a differential extension update. The property uniquely identifies only the files that changed in the new version of that extension. The key is automatically stripped out when the extension is installed.
::::
:::::

::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec44 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec44Heading"}
### event_rules {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec44Heading .Heading}

**Chromium Browsers Only**

**Deprecated**

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB139 .pagebreak aria-label="139" role="doc-pagebreak" title="139"}This [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm253}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm254} is deprecated; it defines rules that can modify in-flight network requests using [declarativeWebRequest]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} or take actions depending on the page content -- all without requiring permission to read the page's content using [declarativeContent]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}. [declarativeWebRequest]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} is deprecated in favor of [declarativeNetRequest]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, so this property should not be used.
:::

::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec45 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec45Heading"}
### externally_connectable {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec45Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par256 .Para}
This [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm255}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm256} defines which external extensions or web pages can interact with this extension via [runtime.connect()]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} or [runtime.sendMessage()]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}. If not defined, the default behavior is to allow all external extensions to communicate via these methods, but to disallow all web pages from communicating via these methods. The property value is an [object]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm257}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm258} that can define the following:

::: UnorderedList
-   If the [ids]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} array is defined, only extensions with matching IDs are allowed to connect. This array accepts a [\*]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} wildcard to allow all extensions.

-   If the [matches]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} array is defined, only web pages with matching URLs will be allowed to connect.

-   If the [accepts_tls_channel_id]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} property is set to [true]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, messages will include the TLS channel ID in the outgoing message to identify the originating frame.
:::
::::

The following is an example of how this property can be used:

:::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par261 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB140 .pagebreak aria-label="140" role="doc-pagebreak" title="140"}*Example value for* [*externally_connectable*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm259}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm260}

::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC36 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"externally_connectable\": {**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"ids\": \[**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"allowmeabcdefabcdefabcdefabcdefa\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\],**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"matches\": \[**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"https://\*.example.com/\*\"**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\],**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **\"accepts_tls_channel_id\": true**
:::

::: FixedLine
  **},**
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::

::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec46 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec46Heading"}
### export {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec46Heading .Heading}

**ChromeOS Only**

[Shared Modules]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm261}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm262}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm263} are collections of resources shared between extensions, used for APIs or download optimization. Defined in the manifest with [export]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} and [import]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} fields, they allow extensions to share and access resources via reserved paths. Shared Modules are not supported by the Chrome Web Store and should not be used.
:::

::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec47 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec47Heading"}
### file_browser_handlers {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec47Heading .Heading}

**ChromeOS Only**

**MV3 Only**

[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PB141 .pagebreak aria-label="141" role="doc-pagebreak" title="141"}This [property]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm264}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm265} defines an array containing file browser handler objects that can extend the ChromeOS file browser. This is only applicable on ChromeOS devices. The following is an example of how this property can be used:

:::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Par267 .Para}
*Example value for* [*file_browser_handlers*]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm266}[]{#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm267}

::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_PC37 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
{
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\"file_browser_handlers\": \[**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **{**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"id\": \"upload\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"default_title\": \"Save File\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\"file_filters\": \[**
:::

::: FixedLine
        **\"filesystem:\*.\*\",**
:::

::: FixedLine
      **\]**
:::

::: FixedLine
    **}**
:::

::: FixedLine
  **\]**,
:::

::: FixedLine
  \...
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_FPar32 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

The ChromeOS file browser handler is out of the scope of this book. For documentation, refer to [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/fileBrowserHandler/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/fileBrowserHandler/)]{.ExternalRef}.
::::
:::::::::::::::::::::

:::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_5_Chapter.xhtml_Sec48 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec48Heading"}
