### Internationalization {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec19Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par90 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [i18n]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm49} -- Chrome [Docs]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm50}: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/i18n/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/i18n/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [i18n]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm51} -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/i18n]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/i18n)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par93 .Para}
The [chrome.i18n]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm52} allows you to determine system languages as well as read messages out of your [\_locales/\_code\_/messages.json]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} files. The following example reads the active system language and retrieves a message from that language:

:::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC19 .ProgramCode}
::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
**chrome.i18n.getUILanguage**();
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.i18n.getMessage**(\"foo_message\");
:::
:::::
::::::
:::::::

:::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par94 .Para}
The [@@]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} syntax is used for Chrome-defined, reserved placeholders that expose built-in values related to the current extension or the user's environment. These are not custom messages you define in your own [\_locales]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} files. Instead, Chrome automatically provides them at runtime. These placeholders are injected just like regular localized strings using the [\_\_MSG\_\<message_name\>\_\_]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} format, but the message name starts with @@, which indicates it's a system-provided value. For example, the following CSS definition might be used in a content script to avoid hard-coding the extension ID:[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB295 .pagebreak aria-label="295" role="doc-pagebreak" title="295"}

::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC20 .ProgramCode}
:::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
body {
:::

::: FixedLine
  background-image: url(\"chrome-extension://**\_\_MSG\_@@extension_id\_\_**/background.png\");
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::
::::::
:::::::
::::::::
::::::::::::::::

:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec20 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec20Heading"}
### AI {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec20Heading .Heading}

At the time of the writing of this [book]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm53}, the Chrome browser was trialing an early version of a [large language model (LLM)]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm54} deployed directly inside the browser and accessible via JavaScript APIs. While the program is still in its infancy, it seems highly likely that browsers and extensions will have access to local AI runtime, enabling new kinds of intelligent, privacy-preserving web applications.

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par96 .Para}
Chrome makes this possible through the use of [Gemini Nano]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm55}, a compact, on-device language model that can be downloaded and executed directly within Chrome. Once the model has been downloaded, extensions can create a local session, prompt the model using natural language, stream responses, and customize behavior with system and initial prompts. This architecture eliminates the need to send user data to external servers, enabling rich AI [features]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm56} to run entirely within the user's browser. Chrome provides access through a set of dedicated API wrappers around the model:

::: UnorderedList
-   The [**Translator API**]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm57}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm58} translates user-generated and dynamic text content on demand by sending it to a built-in translation model.

-   The [**Language Detector API**]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm59}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm60} analyzes input text and returns the most likely language code to support language-aware features.

-   The [**Summarizer API**]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm61}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm62} uses an on-device Gemini Nano model to condense long-form text into shorter, more digestible summaries.

-   []{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB296 .pagebreak aria-label="296" role="doc-pagebreak" title="296"}The [**Writer API**]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm63}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm64} generates new text based on a task and optional context, while the [**Rewriter API**]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm65}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm66} modifies existing text to match a desired tone, length, or style.

-   The [**Prompt API**]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm67}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm68} sends natural language requests to Gemini Nano and returns structured or freeform responses based on the prompt's intent.
:::
::::

::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par102 .Para}
The specific usage of these APIs and models may change over time. At the time of the writing of this book, the following code demonstrates how to use the [Prompt API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm69}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm70}:

:::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC21 .ProgramCode}
:::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
const capabilities = await LanguageModel.capabilities();
:::
::::

:::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
// Indicates the browser can use Gemnini Nano, but it must
:::

::: FixedLine
// download the model first
:::

::: FixedLine
console.log(capabilities);
:::

::: FixedLine
// {
:::

::: FixedLine
//    **available: \'after-download',**
:::

::: FixedLine
//    defaultTopK: 3,
:::

::: FixedLine
//    maxTopK: 8,
:::

::: FixedLine
//    defaultTemperature: 1
:::

::: FixedLine
// }
:::
::::::::::::

:::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
const session = await LanguageModel.create({
:::

::: FixedLine
  systemPrompt: \'You are a helpful assistant.\',
:::

::: FixedLine
  monitor: (m) =\>
:::

::: FixedLine
    m.addEventListener(\'downloadprogress\', (e) =\>
:::

::: FixedLine
      console.log(\`Downloading: \${e.loaded}/\${e.total}\`)
:::

::: FixedLine
    )
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::
::::::::::

::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
const res = await session.prompt(\'What is the capital of France?\');
:::

::: FixedLine
console.log(\'Response:\', res);// The capital of France is Paris
:::
:::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_FPar6 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB297 .pagebreak aria-label="297" role="doc-pagebreak" title="297"}Chapter [[[12]{.RefSource}](#534317_2_En_12_Chapter.xhtml)]{.ExternalRef} includes examples of how to write extensions that use on-device and remotely hosted LLMs.
::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec21 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec21Heading"}
### Browser and System Control {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec21Heading .Heading}

The WebExtensions API [offers]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm71} a number of methods for inspecting and controlling the host system or UI.

::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec22 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec22Heading"}
#### [Power]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm72} {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec22Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par105 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [power]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm73} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/power/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/power/)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par107 .Para}
The [chrome.power]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API allows the extension to prevent the host system from going to sleep.

::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC22 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
// Keeps the system active,
:::

::: FixedLine
// but allows the screen to be dimmed or turned off.
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.power.requestKeepAwake**(\"system\");
:::

::: FixedLine
// Keeps the screen and system active
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.power.requestKeepAwake**(\"display\");
:::

::: FixedLine
// Allows the host to behave normally
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.power.releaseKeepAwake**();
:::
::::::::::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec23 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec23Heading"}
#### Omnibox {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec23Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par108 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [omnibox]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm74}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm75} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/omnibox/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/omnibox/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [omnibox]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/omnibox]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/omnibox)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par111 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB298 .pagebreak aria-label="298" role="doc-pagebreak" title="298"}The [chrome.omnibox]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API allows you to embed a special search interface into the browser's URL bar (Figure [[9-1](#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Fig1)]{.InternalRef}). You can control the keyword that triggers the interface, which results appear, how the results are presented, and what happens when a result is selected.

<figure id="Fig1" class="Figure">
<div id="534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_MO1" class="MediaObject">
<img src="/app/temp/1773197898499_images/images/534317_2_En_9_Chapter/534317_2_En_9_Fig1_HTML.jpg" class="ImageStyle3" alt="Screenshot of a Chrome browser window showing the Extensions page. The search bar contains the text &quot;modify,&quot; displaying search results for &quot;Example Chrome Extension&quot; and &quot;Modify Toolbar Icon.&quot; Below, the &quot;Example Chrome Extension&quot; is highlighted with details such as version 1.0.22, description, and ID. Options to &quot;Details&quot; and &quot;Remove&quot; the extension are visible, along with a toggle switch for enabling or disabling it." />
</div>
<figcaption><div class="CaptionContent">
<span class="CaptionNumber">Figure 9-1</span>
<p>Example omnibox results</p>
</div></figcaption>
</figure>
:::

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par112 .Para}
The following example populates the omnibar with a suggestion list, filtered by text match. If one is selected, it navigates to the URL.

:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC23 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
const suggestions = \[
:::

::: FixedLine
  {
:::

::: FixedLine
    content: url1,
:::

::: FixedLine
    description: \`
:::

::: FixedLine
      \${title1}
:::

::: FixedLine
      \<dim\>\${subtitle1}\</dim\>
:::

::: FixedLine
      \<url\>\${url1}\</url\>\`,
:::

::: FixedLine
  },
:::

::: FixedLine
  {
:::

::: FixedLine
    content: url2,
:::

::: FixedLine
    description: \`
:::

::: FixedLine
      \${title2}
:::

::: FixedLine
      \<dim\>\${subtitle2}\</dim\>
:::

::: FixedLine
      \<url\>\${url2}\</url\>\`,
:::

::: FixedLine
  }
:::

::: FixedLine
\];
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.omnibox.onInputChanged**.addListener(
:::

::: FixedLine
  (text, suggest) =\> {
:::

::: FixedLine
    suggest(suggestions.filter(s =\> s.content.includes(text))
:::

::: FixedLine
  **}**
:::

::: FixedLine
);
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.omnibox.onInputEntered**.addListener(
:::

::: FixedLine
  (text, disposition) =\> {
:::

::: FixedLine
    // Navigate to selected url
:::

::: FixedLine
    chrome.tabs.update(activeTabId, { url: text });
:::

::: FixedLine
  });
:::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec24 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec24Heading"}
#### Action {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec24Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par113 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [action]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm76}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm77} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/action/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/action/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [action]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/action]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/action)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par116 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB299 .pagebreak aria-label="299" role="doc-pagebreak" title="299"}The [chrome.action]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API allows you to control the extension toolbar icon, including appearance, title text, badge content, badge color, popup page, and click handlers (Figure [[9-2](#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Fig2)]{.InternalRef}).[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB300 .pagebreak aria-label="300" role="doc-pagebreak" title="300"}

<figure id="Fig2" class="Figure">
<div id="534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_MO2" class="MediaObject">
<img src="/app/temp/1773197898499_images/images/534317_2_En_9_Chapter/534317_2_En_9_Fig2_HTML.jpg" class="ImageStyle3" alt="Screenshot of a browser interface showing a search bar with a magnifying glass icon, a clipboard icon, and a toggle switch labeled &quot;Developer mode&quot; set to on. A tooltip displays &quot;Example Chrome Extension&quot; near the magnifying glass icon." />
</div>
<figcaption><div class="CaptionContent">
<span class="CaptionNumber">Figure 9-2</span>
<p>The toolbar icon button showing the title text</p>
</div></figcaption>
</figure>
:::

::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par117 .Para}
:::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC24 .ProgramCode}
::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
**chrome.action.onClicked**.addListener(() =\> {})
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.action.setTitle**({ title: \"foo\"});
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.action.setBadgeText**({ title: \"bar\"});
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.action.setPopup**({
:::

::: FixedLine
  popup: chrome.runtime.getURL(\"new_popup.html\")
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::
:::::::::
::::::::::
:::::::::::
:::::::::::::::

::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec25 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec25Heading"}
#### Notifications {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec25Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par118 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [notifications]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm78}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm79} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/notifications/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/notifications/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [notifications]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/notifications]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/notifications)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par121 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB301 .pagebreak aria-label="301" role="doc-pagebreak" title="301"}The [chrome.notification]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm80}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm81} allows an extension to display rich notifications to the user using the host operating system's notification mechanism (Figure [[9-3](#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Fig3)]{.InternalRef}).

<figure id="Fig3" class="Figure">
<div id="534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_MO3" class="MediaObject">
<img src="/app/temp/1773197898499_images/images/534317_2_En_9_Chapter/534317_2_En_9_Fig3_HTML.jpg" class="ImageStyle6" alt="Notification screenshot showing a Chrome icon on the left and a magnifying glass icon on the right. The notification reads, &quot;My notification! This is the message.&quot; The background features a starry sky." />
</div>
<figcaption><div class="CaptionContent">
<span class="CaptionNumber">Figure 9-3</span>
<p>An example <span id="534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm82">extension</span><span id="534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm83"></span> notification</p>
</div></figcaption>
</figure>
:::

::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par122 .Para}
:::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC25 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
**chrome.notifications.create**(
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"NOTIFICATION_ID\",
:::

::: FixedLine
  {
:::

::: FixedLine
    type: \"basic\",
:::

::: FixedLine
    iconUrl: \"/img.png\",
:::

::: FixedLine
    title: \"My notification!\",
:::

::: FixedLine
    message: \"This is the message\",
:::

::: FixedLine
    priority: 2
:::

::: FixedLine
  }
:::

::: FixedLine
);
:::
:::::::::::::
::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec26 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec26Heading"}
#### Context Menu {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec26Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par123 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [contextMenus]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm84}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm85} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/contextMenus/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/contextMenus/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [menus]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/menus]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/menus)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par126 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB302 .pagebreak aria-label="302" role="doc-pagebreak" title="302"}The [chrome.contextMenus]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API allows an extension to add interactive options to right click and context menus throughout the browser (Figure [[9-4](#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Fig4)]{.InternalRef}).

<figure id="Fig4" class="Figure">
<div id="534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_MO4" class="MediaObject">
<img src="/app/temp/1773197898499_images/images/534317_2_En_9_Chapter/534317_2_En_9_Fig4_HTML.jpg" class="ImageStyle3" alt="Screenshot of a web browser displaying the Wikipedia homepage. The browser&#39;s context menu is open, showing options like &quot;Back,&quot; &quot;Forward,&quot; &quot;Reload,&quot; and &quot;Save As.&quot; A submenu titled &quot;Example Chrome Extension&quot; is expanded, with options such as &quot;Open Demo,&quot; &quot;Check and uncheck me!,&quot; and &quot;Select a radio button...&quot; The cursor hovers over &quot;Select a radio button...,&quot; revealing a list of radio options labeled &quot;Radio 1&quot; to &quot;Radio 5,&quot; with &quot;Radio 3&quot; selected. The Wikipedia logo and language options are visible in the background." />
</div>
<figcaption><div class="CaptionContent">
<span class="CaptionNumber">Figure 9-4</span>
<p>An expanded extension context menu</p>
</div></figcaption>
</figure>
:::

::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par127 .Para}
:::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC26 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
**chrome.contextMenus.create**({
:::

::: FixedLine
  id: \"demo-radio\",
:::

::: FixedLine
  title: \"Select a radio button\...\",
:::

::: FixedLine
  contexts: \[\"all\"\],
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::

::: FixedLine
for (let i of \[1, 2, 3, 4, 5\]) {
:::

::: FixedLine
  **chrome.contextMenus.create**({
:::

::: FixedLine
    id: \`demo-radio-\${i}\`,
:::

::: FixedLine
    parentId: \"demo-radio\",
:::

::: FixedLine
    title: \`Radio \${i}\`,
:::

::: FixedLine
    contexts: \[\"all\"\],
:::

::: FixedLine
    type: \"radio\",
:::

::: FixedLine
  });
:::

::: FixedLine
}
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.contextMenus.create**({
:::

::: FixedLine
  id: \"demo-media\",
:::

::: FixedLine
  title: \"You right clicked a media element\",
:::

::: FixedLine
  contexts: \[\"image\", \"video\", \"audio\"\],
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.contextMenus.onClicked**.addListener((info, tab) =\> {});
:::
:::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec27 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec27Heading"}
### Page and Screen Capture {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec27Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par128 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [pageCapture]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm86}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm87} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/pageCapture/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/pageCapture/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [tabCapture]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm88} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/tabCapture/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/tabCapture/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [tabCapture]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm89} -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/tabs/captureTab]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/tabs/captureTab)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [desktopCapture]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm90} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/desktopCapture/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/desktopCapture/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [captureVisibleTab]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm91} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/tabs/#method-captureVisibleTab]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/tabs/#method-captureVisibleTab)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [captureVisibleTab]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm92} -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/tabs/captureVisibleTab]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/tabs/captureVisibleTab)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

:::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par135 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB304 .pagebreak aria-label="304" role="doc-pagebreak" title="304"}Extensions are able to capture the system's current state in a handful of different ways: by saving the HTML, taking images of the active tab, or capturing media from the current desktop.

::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC27 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::::::::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
// Save a specific tab as MHTML
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.pageCapture.saveAsMHTML**(
:::

::: FixedLine
  {
:::

::: FixedLine
    tabId: 123
:::

::: FixedLine
  }
:::

::: FixedLine
)
:::

::: FixedLine
// Captures the visible area of the currently active tab.
:::

::: FixedLine
chrome.action.onClicked.addListener(() =\> {
:::

::: FixedLine
  **chrome.tabCapture.capture**(
:::

::: FixedLine
    { video: true },
:::

::: FixedLine
    (stream) =\> {}
:::

::: FixedLine
  );
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::

::: FixedLine
// Captures content of screen, individual windows or tabs.
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.desktopCapture.chooseDesktopMedia**(
:::

::: FixedLine
  sources: \[\"screen\"\],
:::

::: FixedLine
  (streamId, options) =\> {}
:::

::: FixedLine
);
:::

::: FixedLine
// Captures the visible area of the currently active tab
:::

::: FixedLine
// in the specified window.
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.tabs.captureVisibleTab**(
:::

::: FixedLine
  (dataUrl) =\>{}
:::

::: FixedLine
);
:::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

:::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec28 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec28Heading"}
### Proxy {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec28Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par136 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [[proxy]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm93}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm94} API -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/proxy/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/proxy/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [proxy]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/proxy]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/proxy)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

Use the [chrome.proxy]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API to manage the browser's proxy settings.

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_FPar7 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

Per MDN: *Google Chrome provides an extension API also called "*[*proxy*]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm95}*" which is functionally similar to this API, in that extensions can use it to implement a proxying policy. However, the design of the Chrome API is completely different to this API. Because this API is incompatible with the Chrome proxy API, this API is only available through the browser namespace.*
::::

::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par141 .Para}
:::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC28 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
**chrome.proxy.settings.set**(
:::

::: FixedLine
  {
:::

::: FixedLine
    value: {
:::

::: FixedLine
      mode: \"fixed_servers\",
:::

::: FixedLine
      rules: {
:::

::: FixedLine
        proxyForHttp: {
:::

::: FixedLine
          scheme: \"socks5\",
:::

::: FixedLine
          host: \"192.168.1.2\",
:::

::: FixedLine
        },
:::

::: FixedLine
        bypassList: \[\"wikipedia.org\"\],
:::

::: FixedLine
      },
:::

::: FixedLine
    },
:::

::: FixedLine
    scope[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm96}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm97}: \"regular\",
:::

::: FixedLine
  },
:::

::: FixedLine
  () =\> {}
:::

::: FixedLine
);
:::
:::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::

:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec29 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec29Heading"}
### Browser State Management {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec29Heading .Heading}

[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB306 .pagebreak aria-label="306" role="doc-pagebreak" title="306"}The WebExtensions API gives you a broad set of tools for managing the state of the user's [browser]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm98}.

:::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec30 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec30Heading"}
#### Font Settings {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec30Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par143 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [fontSettings]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm99}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm100} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/fontSettings/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/fontSettings/)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par145 .Para}
The API allows an extension to manage for some font settings to depend on certain generic font families and language scripts.

:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC29 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
**chrome.fontSettings.getFont**[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm101}(
:::

::: FixedLine
  { genericFamily: \'standard\', script: \'Egyp\' },
:::

::: FixedLine
  (details) =\> {}
:::

::: FixedLine
);
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome**[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm102}**.fontSettings.setFont**(
:::

::: FixedLine
  { genericFamily: \'serif\', script: \'Jpan\',
:::

::: FixedLine
    fontId: \'Comic Sans\' }
:::

::: FixedLine
);
:::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::
:::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::

::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec31 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec31Heading"}
#### Content Settings {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec31Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par146 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [contentSettings]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm103}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm104} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/contentSettings/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/contentSettings/)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par148 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB307 .pagebreak aria-label="307" role="doc-pagebreak" title="307"}This API allows you to customize the browser's behavior on a per-site basis instead of globally: enabling or disabling cookies, JavaScript, and plug-ins. Each of the following properties has a [get()]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [set()]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, and [clear()]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} method:

::: UnorderedList
-   [automaticDownloads]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [camera]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [cookies]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [fullscreen]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [images]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [javascript]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [location]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [microphone]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [mouselock]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [notifications]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [plugins]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [popups]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [unsa]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}[nd]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}[boxedPlugins]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}
:::
::::
:::::::

::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec32 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec32Heading"}
#### Cookies {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec32Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par162 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [cookies]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm105}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm106} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/cookies/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/cookies/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [cookies]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/cookies]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/cookies)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

:::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par165 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB308 .pagebreak aria-label="308" role="doc-pagebreak" title="308"}The [chrome.cookies]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API is a create/read/update/destroy interface for the browser's cookies.

::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC30 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
const cookies = await **chrome.cookies.getAll**();
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.cookies.set**({
:::

::: FixedLine
    \"name\": \"foo\",
:::

::: FixedLine
    \"url\": \"https://www.wikipedia.org\",
:::

::: FixedLine
    \"value\": \"bar\"
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.cookies.remove**(
:::

::: FixedLine
    \"name\": \"foo\",
:::

::: FixedLine
    \"url\": \"https://www.wikipedia.org\"
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome**[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm107}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm108}**.cookies.onChanged**.addListener(() =\> {});
:::
::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::

:::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec33 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec33Heading"}
#### Bookmarks {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec33Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par166 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [bookmarks]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm109}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm110} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/bookmarks/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/bookmarks/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [bookmarks]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/bookmarks]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/bookmarks)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par169 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB309 .pagebreak aria-label="309" role="doc-pagebreak" title="309"}The [chrome.bookmarks]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API is a create/read/update/destroy interface for the browser's bookmarks. It includes methods to manage the hierarchical [nature]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm111}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm112} of bookmarks.

:::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC31 .ProgramCode}
::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
**chrome.bookmarks.create**(
:::

::: FixedLine
  {\'title\': \'Wikipedia\', \'url\': \'https://www.wikipedia.org\'}
:::

::: FixedLine
);
:::

::: FixedLine
const allBookmarks = await **chrome.bookmarks.getTree**();
:::

::: FixedLine
const matchingNodes =
:::

::: FixedLine
  await **chrome.bookmarks.search**[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm113}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm114}({ query: \'wikipedia\' });
:::
:::::::::
::::::::::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::::

:::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec34 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec34Heading"}
#### Reading List {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec34Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par170 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [readingList]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm115}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm116} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/readingList/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/readingList/)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

The [chrome.readingList]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API allows extensions to interact with the browser's built-in Reading List feature. It provides methods to add, retrieve, and remove Reading List entries.

::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par173 .Para}
:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC32 .ProgramCode}
:::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
// Add a new entry to the Reading List
:::

::: FixedLine
chrome.readingList.addEntry({
:::

::: FixedLine
  title: \'Interesting Article\',
:::

::: FixedLine
  url: \'https://example.com/article\',
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::
::::::::

::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
// Get all current Reading List entries
:::

::: FixedLine
const entries = await[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm117}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm118} chrome.readingList.getEntries();
:::
:::::
::::::::::::
:::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::

::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec35 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec35Heading"}
#### History {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec35Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par174 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [history]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm119}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm120} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/history/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/history/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [history]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/history]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/history)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par177 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB310 .pagebreak aria-label="310" role="doc-pagebreak" title="310"}The [chrome.history]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API is a create/read/update/destroy interface for the browser's browsing history.

::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC33 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
**chrome.history.deleteAll**();
:::

::: FixedLine
const allPages = await **chrome.history.search**();
:::

::: FixedLine
// Wikipedia pages in last 30 minutes
:::

::: FixedLine
const pages = await **chrome.history.search**({
:::

::: FixedLine
  text: \'wikipedia[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm121}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm122}\',
:::

::: FixedLine
  startTime: Date.now() -- (30 \* 60 \* 1E3)
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::
::::::::::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::

::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec36 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec36Heading"}
#### Downloads {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec36Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par178 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [downloads]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm123}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm124} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/downloads/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/downloads/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [downloads]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/downloads]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/downloads)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

:::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par181 .Para}
The [chrome.downloads]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API is a create/read/update/destroy interface for the browser's downloads. "Creating" a download means forcing the browser to download from a specified URL.[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB311 .pagebreak aria-label="311" role="doc-pagebreak" title="311"}

::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC34 .ProgramCode}
:::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
// Start a download
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.downloads.download**({
:::

::: FixedLine
  url: \"https://www.wikipedia.org/portal/wikipedia.org/assets/img/Wikipedia-logo-v2@2x.png\",
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::

::: FixedLine
const allDownloads[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm125}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm126} = await **chrome.downloads.search**({});
:::
::::::::
:::::::::
::::::::::
:::::::::::::

::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec37 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec37Heading"}
#### Top Sites {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec37Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par182 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [topSites]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm127}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm128} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/topSites/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/topSites/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [topSites]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/topSites]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/topSites)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

:::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par185 .Para}
This API allows an extension to read the "top sites" (most visited sites) displayed on the new tab page.

::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC35 .ProgramCode}
:::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
const [topSites]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm129}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm130} = await **chrome.topSites.get**();
:::
::::
:::::
::::::
:::::::::

:::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec38 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec38Heading"}
#### Browsing Data {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec38Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par186 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [browsingData]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm131}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm132} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/browsingData/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/browsingData/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [browsingData]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/browsingData]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/browsingData)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par189 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB312 .pagebreak aria-label="312" role="doc-pagebreak" title="312"}This API allows an extension to programmatically remove browsing data, which encompasses a considerable number of categories.

:::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC36 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
**chrome.browsingData.remove**({
:::

::: FixedLine
  // Last 24 hours
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"since\": (Date.now() - 24 \* 60 \* 60 \* 1E3)
:::

::: FixedLine
}, {
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"appcache\": true,
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"cache\": true,
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"cacheStorage\": true,
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"cookies\": true,
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"downloads\": true,
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"fileSystems\": true,
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"formData\": true,
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"history\": true,
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"indexedDB\": true,
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"localStorage\": true,
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"passwords\": true,
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"serviceWorkers\": true,
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"webSQL\": true
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::
:::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::

:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec39 .section .Section3 .RenderAsSection3 aria-labelledby="Sec39Heading"}
#### Sessions {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec39Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par190 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [sessions]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm133}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm134} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/sessions/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/sessions/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [sessions]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/sessions]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/sessions)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par193 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB313 .pagebreak aria-label="313" role="doc-pagebreak" title="313"}This API allows an extension to programmatically inspect and reopen recently closed tabs.

:::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC37 .ProgramCode}
::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
const recentlyClosed =
:::

::: FixedLine
  await **chrome.sessions.getRecentlyClosed**();
:::

::: FixedLine
// Restores the most recently[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm135}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm136} closed tab
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.sessions.restore**();
:::
:::::::
::::::::
:::::::::
::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec40 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec40Heading"}
### Tabs and Windows {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec40Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par194 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [tabs]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm137}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm138} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/tabs/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/tabs/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [tabs]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/tabs]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/tabs)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [windows]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm139} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/windows/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/windows/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [windows]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/windows]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/windows)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [tabGroups]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/tabGroups/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/tabGroups/)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par200 .Para}
These APIs allow a browser to totally control the tabs and windows that appear inside a browser. It can perform tasks such as create, remove, inspect, modify, rearrange, pin, and mute.

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC38 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
const \[activeTab\] = await **chrome.tabs.query**({
:::

::: FixedLine
  active: true,
:::

::: FixedLine
  currentWindow: true
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.tabs.create**({
:::

::: FixedLine
  active: false,
:::

::: FixedLine
  url: \"https://www.wikipedia.org\",
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::

::: FixedLine
// Close a tab
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.tabs.remove**(tabId);
:::

::: FixedLine
// Reload a tab
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.tabs.reload**(tabId);
:::

::: FixedLine
// Create a new window
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.windows.create**({
:::

::: FixedLine
  focused: true,
:::

::: FixedLine
  url: \"https://www.wikipedia.org \",
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::

::: FixedLine
// Close a window
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.windows.remove**(tabId);
:::

::: FixedLine
const allTabGroups = await **chrome.tabGroups.query**();
:::

::: FixedLine
// Update a tab group
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.tabGroups.update**(
:::

::: FixedLine
  groupId,
:::

::: FixedLine
  { title: \"foo\" }
:::

::: FixedLine
);
:::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

:::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec41 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec41Heading"}
### User Scripts {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec41Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par201 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [userScripts]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm140}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm141} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/userScripts/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/userScripts/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [userScripts]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/userScripts]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/userScripts)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB315 .pagebreak aria-label="315" role="doc-pagebreak" title="315"}The userScripts API enables extensions to register third-party scripts that modify web pages or introduce new features, attaching them to pages based on URL match patterns defined at registration. It offers a secure, isolated environment for executing user scripts similar to content scripts, but specifically designed for handling untrusted third-party code. Extensions can choose to run scripts in a [USER_SCRIPT]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} world (isolated from pages and other extensions) or in the [MAIN]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} world (shared with pages and extensions). Messaging is supported via [runtime.sendMessage()]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} and [runtime.connect()]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} but received using dedicated [runtime.onUserScriptMessage]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} and [runtime.onUserScriptConnect]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} handlers for clarity and safety. Messaging must be enabled through [userScripts.configureWorld({ messaging: true })]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}.

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par205 .Para}
The API is accessed slightly differently between browsers:

::: UnorderedList
-   In Chrome, the extension must declare the [\"userScripts\"]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} permission and appropriate [\"host_permissions\"]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} in the manifest, and users must enable Developer Mode.

-   In Firefox, the extension must declare [\"userScripts\"]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} in [optional_permissions]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} and then request the permission at runtime.
:::
::::

::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par208 .Para}
:::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC39 .ProgramCode}
::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
await chrome.userScripts.register(\[{
:::

::: FixedLine
  matches: \[\"\*://\*.wikipedia.org/\*\"\],
:::

::: FixedLine
  js: \[{ file: \"injected.js\" }\],
:::

::: FixedLine
  runAt: \"document_idle\",
:::

::: FixedLine
  world: \"ISOLATED\"
:::

::: FixedLine
}\]);
:::
:::::::::

:::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
const scripts = await chrome.userScripts.getScripts();
:::
::::

:::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
chrome.runtime.onUserScriptMessage.addListener((msg) =\> {
:::

::: FixedLine
  console.log(\"User script message:\", msg);
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::
::::::
::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_FPar8 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB316 .pagebreak aria-label="316" role="doc-pagebreak" title="316"}Chapter [[[12]{.RefSource}](#534317_2_En_12_Chapter.xhtml)]{.ExternalRef} includes examples of how to build a userscript extension.
::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::

:::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec42 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec42Heading"}
### Debugger {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec42Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par210 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [debugger]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm142}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm143} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/debugger/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/debugger/)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par212 .Para}
The [chrome.debugger]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API allows you to send commands over the Chrome Devtools Protocol ([[[[https://chromedevtools.github.io/devtools-protocol/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://chromedevtools.github.io/devtools-protocol/)]{.ExternalRef}). With it, you can do almost anything that the DevTools API is capable of, including querying the response body, if the browser's developer tools interface is not open.

:::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC40 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
**chrome.debugger.attach**(
:::

::: FixedLine
  tabId,
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"1.0\",
:::

::: FixedLine
  () =\> {}
:::

::: FixedLine
);
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.debugger.sendCommand**(
:::

::: FixedLine
  tabId,
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"Debugger.enable\"
:::

::: FixedLine
);
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.debugger.sendCommand**(
:::

::: FixedLine
  tabId,
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"Debugger.setBreakpointByUrl\",
:::

::: FixedLine
  {
:::

::: FixedLine
    lineNumber[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm144}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm145}: 10,
:::

::: FixedLine
    url: \'https://www.wikipedia.org/script.js\'
:::

::: FixedLine
  });
:::
:::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::

:::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec43 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec43Heading"}
### Search {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec43Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par213 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [search]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm146}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm147} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/search/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/search/)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par215 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB317 .pagebreak aria-label="317" role="doc-pagebreak" title="317"}This API allows you to programmatically execute searches in the browser's default search provider.

:::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC41 .ProgramCode}
::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
**chrome.search.query**(
:::

::: FixedLine
  { disposition: \"NEW_TAB\", text: \"wikipedia\" });
:::
:::::
::::::
:::::::
::::::::::

::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec44 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec44Heading"}
### Alarms {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec44Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par216 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [alarms]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm148}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm149} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/alarms/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/alarms/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [alarms]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/alarms]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/alarms)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

:::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par219 .Para}
This API is used to schedule code to run in the future. It is similar in concept to [setTimeout()]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} and [setInterval()]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, but it is able to wake a service worker.

::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC42 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
// Fire alarm event in 1 minute
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.alarms.create**({ delayInMinutes: 1 });
:::

::: FixedLine
// Fire alarm event every 5 minutes
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.alarms.create**({ periodInMinutes: 5 });
:::

::: FixedLine
// Fire alarm event in 90 seconds
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.alarms.create**[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm150}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm151}({ when: (Date.now() + 90 \* 1E3) });
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.alarms.onAlarm**.addListener((alarm) =\> {})
:::
::::::::::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec45 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec45Heading"}
### Scripting {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec45Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par220 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [scripting]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm152}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm153} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/scripting/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/scripting/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [scripting]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/scripting]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/scripting)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

:::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par223 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB318 .pagebreak aria-label="318" role="doc-pagebreak" title="318"}This [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm154}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm155} is used to programmatically inject JavaScript or CSS into the page.

::::::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC43 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::::::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
function fooScript() {}
:::

::: FixedLine
// Inject a function
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.scripting.executeScript**({
:::

::: FixedLine
  target: { tabId: 123 },
:::

::: FixedLine
  function: fooScript
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::

::: FixedLine
// Inject a script file
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.scripting.executeScript**({
:::

::: FixedLine
  target: { tabId: 123 },
:::

::: FixedLine
  files: \[\'script.js\'\]
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::

::: FixedLine
// Inject CSS string
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.scripting.insertCSS**({
:::

::: FixedLine
  target: { tabId: 123 },
:::

::: FixedLine
  css: \'body { background-color: red; }\'
:::

::: FixedLine
})**;**
:::

::: FixedLine
// Inject CSS file
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.scripting.insertCSS**[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm156}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm157}({
:::

::: FixedLine
  target: { tabId: 123 },
:::

::: FixedLine
  files: \[\'styles.css\'\]
:::

::: FixedLine
})**;**
:::
::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec46 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec46Heading"}
### DOM {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec46Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par224 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [dom]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm158}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm159} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/dom/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/dom/)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

:::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par226 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB319 .pagebreak aria-label="319" role="doc-pagebreak" title="319"}The [dom]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API has a single method, [openOrClosedShadowRoot()]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, used to get the open shadow root or the closed shadow root hosted by the specified [element]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm160}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm161}.

::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC44 .ProgramCode}
:::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
**chrome.dom.openOrClosedShadowRoot**(el);
:::
::::
:::::
::::::
:::::::::

::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec47 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec47Heading"}
### Offscreen {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec47Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par227 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [offscreen]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm162}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm163} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/offscreen/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/offscreen/)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

:::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par229 .Para}
The [chrome.offscreen]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API lets extensions create hidden DOM-capable documents to perform tasks like clipboard access or canvas manipulation, which aren't possible in service workers alone.

::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC45 .ProgramCode}
:::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
await chrome.offscreen.createDocument({
:::

::: FixedLine
  url: \'offscreen.html\',
:::

::: FixedLine
  reasons: \[\'CLIPBOARD\'\],
:::

::: FixedLine
  justification: \'Access clipboard from DOM context[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm164}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm165}\',
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::
::::::::
:::::::::
::::::::::
:::::::::::::

:::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec48 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec48Heading"}
### Text to Speech {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec48Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par230 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [TTS]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm166}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm167} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/tts]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/tts)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par232 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB320 .pagebreak aria-label="320" role="doc-pagebreak" title="320"}The [TTS]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API allows you to instruct your browser to speak text aloud using its native text-to-speech engine.

:::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC46 .ProgramCode}
::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
// Browser will speak the text aloud
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.tts.speak**(\'Foo\', {\'lang\': \'en-US\', \'rate\': 2.0});
:::

::: FixedLine
// Waits for previous speech to finish
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.tts.speak**(\'Bar\', {\'enqueue\': true});
:::

::: FixedLine
// Stops the speech[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm168}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm169} immediately
:::

::: FixedLine
chrome**.**tts**.stop**();
:::
:::::::::
::::::::::
:::::::::::
::::::::::::::

:::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec49 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec49Heading"}
### Privacy {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec49Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par233 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [privacy]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm170}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm171} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/privacy/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/privacy/)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par235 .Para}
This API allows an extension to get and set a user's privacy controls.

:::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC47 .ProgramCode}
::::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
**chrome.privacy.services.searchSuggestEnabled.get**(
:::

::: FixedLine
  {},
:::

::: FixedLine
  (details) =\> {
:::

::: FixedLine
    if (details.levelOfControl ===
:::

::: FixedLine
        \'controllable_by_this_extension\') {
:::

::: FixedLine
      **chrome.privacy.services.searchSuggestEnabled.set**[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm172}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm173}(
:::

::: FixedLine
        { value: true }
:::

::: FixedLine
      );
:::

::: FixedLine
    }
:::

::: FixedLine
  });
:::
:::::::::::::
::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::

::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec50 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec50Heading"}
### Idle {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec50Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par236 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [idle]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm174}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm175} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/idle/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/idle/)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

:::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par238 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB321 .pagebreak aria-label="321" role="doc-pagebreak" title="321"}This API indicates when the host system has gone idle.

::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC48 .ProgramCode}
:::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
// Check system state every 30 seconds
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.idle.queryState**(30);
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.idle.onStateChanged**.addListener[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm176}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm177}(() =\> {})
:::
::::::
:::::::
::::::::
:::::::::::

::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec51 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec51Heading"}
### DevTools {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec51Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par239 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   DevTools [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm178}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm179} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/how-to/devtools/extend-devtools]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/how-to/devtools/extend-devtools)]{.ExternalRef}

-   DevTools API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/Extending_the_developer_tools]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/Extending_the_developer_tools)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

:::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par242 .Para}
The DevTools API allows you to add extension UIs to the browser's developer tools interface. These interfaces are granted special access to APIs only accessible from inside the developer tools.

::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC49 .ProgramCode}
:::::::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
// Create a devtools panel
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.devtools.panels.create**(
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"Panel title\",
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"path/to/icon.png\",
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"panel.html\"
:::

::: FixedLine
);
:::

::: FixedLine
// Sniff active page traffic[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm180}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm181}
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.devtools.network.onNavigated**.addListener((url) =\> {
:::

::: FixedLine
});
:::
::::::::::::
:::::::::::::
::::::::::::::

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_FPar9 .FormalPara .FormalParaRenderingStyle1 .ParaTypeImportant}
::: Heading
Note
:::

[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB322 .pagebreak aria-label="322" role="doc-pagebreak" title="322"}Chapter [[[12]{.RefSource}](#534317_2_En_12_Chapter.xhtml)]{.ExternalRef} contains a full example of how to extend the browser's developer tools.
::::
:::::::::::::::::::

::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec52 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec52Heading"}
### [Extension Introspection]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm182} {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec52Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par244 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [extension]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- Chrome Docs: [https://developer.]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

    [[[[chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/extension]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](http://chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/extension)]{.ExternalRef}[/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [extension]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- MDN: [[[[https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/extension]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Mozilla/Add-ons/WebExtensions/API/extension)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

:::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par248 .Para}
This API is a collection of utilities. Many of the methods can be used to inspect the internal configuration of the running extension.

::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC50 .ProgramCode}
:::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
const popupUrl = **chrome.extension.getURL**(\"popup.html\");
:::

::: FixedLine
const allViews = **chrome.extension.getViews**();
:::

::: FixedLine
const popups = **chrome.extension.getViews**[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm183}({ type: \"popup\" });
:::
::::::
:::::::
::::::::
:::::::::::

::::::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec53 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec53Heading"}
### Extension Management {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec53Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par249 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   [management]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [API]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm184}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm185} -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/management/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/management/)]{.ExternalRef}

-   [runtime]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} API -- Chrome Docs: [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/runtime/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/runtime/)]{.ExternalRef}
:::
::::

:::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par252 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB323 .pagebreak aria-label="323" role="doc-pagebreak" title="323"}Extensions can control the fundamentals of their own operation, including reloading themselves, checking for updates, self-uninstalling, and setting the uninstall URL.

::::::::::::::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PC51 .ProgramCode}
:::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
const selfInfo = **chrome.management.getSelf**();
:::
::::

:::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
// Uninstalls the running extension
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.management.uninstallSelf**();
:::

::: FixedLine
const manifest = **chrome.runtime.getManifest**();
:::
::::::

::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
// Reloads the extension
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.runtime.reload**();
:::
:::::

::::::: LineGroup
::: FixedLine
// Specifies the URL to direct the user to
:::

::: FixedLine
// after uninstall
:::

::: FixedLine
**chrome.runtime.setUninstallURL**(
:::

::: FixedLine
  \"https://www.example.com/uninstall-survey\");
:::
:::::::
:::::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::

::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec54 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec54Heading"}
### System State {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec54Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par253 .Para}
::: UnorderedList
-   :::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par254 .Para}
    [system]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} [APIs]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm186}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm187} -- Chrome Docs:

    ::: UnorderedList
    -   [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/system_cpu/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/system_cpu/)]{.ExternalRef}

    -   [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/system_display/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/system_display/)]{.ExternalRef}

    -   [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/system_memory/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/system_memory/)]{.ExternalRef}

    -   [[[[https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/system_storage/]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}]{.RefSource}](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/extensions/reference/api/system_storage/)]{.ExternalRef}
    :::
    ::::
:::
::::

[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB324 .pagebreak aria-label="324" role="doc-pagebreak" title="324"}The system API allows you to inspect certain details about the host operating system. The [cpu]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [display]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, [memory]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}, and [storage]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional} properties are all getters that return a JavaScript object filled with whatever the host [system]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm188}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm189} provides.
:::::

::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec55 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec55Heading"}
### Enterprise Only {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec55Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par260 .Para}
The following APIs are only usable by extensions force-installed by enterprise [policy]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm190} and are not covered in this chapter:

::: UnorderedList
-   [enterprise.deviceAttributes]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [enterprise.hardwarePlatform]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [enterprise.networkingAttributes]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [enterprise.platformKeys]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}
:::
::::
:::::

::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec56 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec56Heading"}
### Firefox Only {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec56Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par265 .Para}
The following APIs are only usable on [Firefox]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm191} and are not covered in this chapter:

::: UnorderedList
-   [captivePortal]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [contextualIdentities]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [dns]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [find]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [menus]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [pcks11]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [sidebarAction]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [theme]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [userScripts]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}
:::
::::
:::::

::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec57 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec57Heading"}
### ChromeOS Only {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec57Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par275 .Para}
[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_PB325 .pagebreak aria-label="325" role="doc-pagebreak" title="325"}The following APIs are only usable on [ChromeOS]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm192} and are not covered in this chapter:

::: UnorderedList
-   [accessibilityFeatures]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [audio]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [certificateProvider]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [fileBrowserHandler]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [fileSystemProvider]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [input.ime]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [loginState]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [platformKeys]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [printing]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [printingMetrics]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [restart]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [restartAfterDelay]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [vpnProvider]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}[]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm193}
:::
::::
:::::

::::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec58 .section .Section2 .RenderAsSection2 aria-labelledby="Sec58Heading"}
### Deprecated {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Sec58Heading .Heading}

:::: {#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_Par289 .Para}
The following APIs are [deprecated]{#534317_2_En_9_Chapter.xhtml_ITerm194} and should not be used:

::: UnorderedList
-   [instanceID]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}

-   [gcm]{.EmphasisFontCategoryNonProportional}
:::
::::
:::::
